creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
The following feedback was provided on 26 April 2013


-- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de

-------- Original Message --------
Subject: Re: www/175756: Inclusion as Commercial FreeBSD Hosting Provider
Date: Fri, 26 Apr 2013 09:40:17 +0530
From: ads <ads@solutionpoint.in>
To: jkois@FreeBSD.org

We provide VPS and custom hosting services to selected clients, not
selling in bulk like our current Linux hosting but we are launching them
in phased manner and have plans to replace Linux very soon, see
www.solutionpoint.in/node/565

One live FreeBSD server at http://122.160.22.14 hosting more than 50
websites.. and few more servers in pipeline.

On Wednesday 24 April 2013 10:06 PM, jkois@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: Inclusion as Commercial FreeBSD Hosting Provider
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: jkois
> State-Changed-When: Wed Apr 24 16:35:39 UTC 2013
> State-Changed-Why:
> Feedback needed.  Set a timeout of 2 weeks.
>
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=175756
